overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark industrial refinery area at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features large storage tanks, overhead pipeline structures, and a flying advertisement vehicle that passes overhead illuminating the area with bright cyan lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial refinery yard with large storage tanks and overhead pipeline bridge

events.description: passes underneath the large industrial pipeline bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark industrial yard toward and passing under a large overhead pipe structure

entered.detail: large horizontal pipe structure supported by metal trusses spanning across the path ahead
large white industrial storage tanks with metal railings
large white industrial storage tanks arranged in rows
industrial metal framework with stairs and platforms attached to the tanks
large angled panels with bright white lights illuminating the area
distant red illuminated sign visible between the industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark industrial refinery yard at night. The camera moves forward through dirt terrain toward a large pipeline bridge spanning overhead. Massive cylindrical storage tanks line both sides of the path, with metal scaffolding on the left and bright lighting arrays on the right. The camera passes underneath the pipe structure around the 15-second mark, emerging into the open yard beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with approaching aerial vehicle

events.description: flying advertisement vehicle enters from the left side with bright illuminated panels

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the industrial yard as a flying advertisement vehicle approaches from the left side

notable_agents.action: flying advertisement vehicle with multiple illuminated cyan billboards approaching from the left and descending slightly

entered.detail: large hovering vehicle with bright cyan and white illuminated advertisement panels on its underside and multiple thrusters

segments.scene_description: Having passed the pipeline bridge, the camera continues through the open industrial yard. A large flying advertisement vehicle enters from the left, its bright cyan illuminated panels cutting through the night. The vehicle approaches steadily, moving from the far left toward the center of the frame as the camera maintains its forward progression through the tank yard.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with aerial vehicle passing overhead

events.description: flying vehicle passes directly overhead moving from left to right
flying vehicle departs toward the left rear, receding into the distance

agents.ego_description: walking forward as the flying vehicle passes directly overhead and then flies away toward the left rear

notable_agents.action: flying advertisement vehicle passing directly overhead with bright lights illuminating the scene, then banking left and departing into the distance

segments.scene_description: The flying vehicle passes directly overhead, its bright advertisement panels illuminating the storage tanks below. It continues moving across the frame toward the right, then banks and heads toward the left rear, gradually receding into the distance. The camera maintains its steady forward movement through the industrial yard as the vehicle becomes a smaller silhouette against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark industrial refinery that is momentarily transformed by the passing glow of a futuristic vehicle. It begins by traversing a dirt path flanked by massive cylindrical storage tanks and metal scaffolding, moving steadily toward a large pipeline bridge that spans overhead. As the camera passes beneath the pipe structure and emerges into an open yard, a large flying advertisement vehicle enters from the left, its bright cyan panels cutting through the darkness. The scene then shifts as the vehicle glides directly overhead, casting a vivid blue light across the storage tanks before banking away toward the rear left. Finally, the camera maintains its forward progression through the yard as the vehicle recedes into the distance, becoming a small silhouette against the night sky.
